mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice (title, content, notice_type, target_role, is_pinned, author_member_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{noticeType}, #{targetRole}, #{isPinned}, #{authorMemberId})
mapper.select: SELECT n.*, m.name AS author_name FROM notice n JOIN member m ON n.author_member_id = m.member_id WHERE n.is_active = 1 AND (n.target_role = 'ALL' OR n.target_role = #{targetRole}) ORDER BY n.is_pinned DESC, n.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice
AND notice_type = #{noticeType}
mapper.update: UPDATE notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, target_role = #{targetRole}, is_pinned = #{isPinned}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
UPDATE notice SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
UPDATE notice SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}
